risk_summary: Military escalation in the Beqaa region since September 23, 2024, has forced contractors to suspend all works on multiple project sites, directly impacting implementation of critical sewage network components.
evidence_quote: the contractors for the 'Remaining works of the Zahle networks and Aitanit pumping stations' and of the 'Anjar Lot 2 contract' informed CDR the suspension of all works since September 23, 2024, due to the escalation of military activities, particularly in the Beqaa region, and the contractors' policy to avert any potential risks.

risk_title: Implementation support mission disrupted by security situation
risk_summary: The planned High-Level Meeting on September 30, 2024, to discuss project progress could not be held due to the prevailing security situation, disrupting project governance and decision-making processes.
evidence_quote: the High-Level Meeting, which was planned September 30, 2024, to discuss the progress made by the project and next steps could not be held due to the prevailing security situation in the country.

risk_title: Regional conflict threatening project site safety
risk_summary: Ongoing regional conflict creates security threats affecting project sites, with World Bank emphasizing avoidance of work in areas near active shelling and requiring clearance of unexploded ordnances before work resumption.
evidence_quote: Due to the current security threat in Lebanon from the ongoing regional conflict, the mission was carried out virtually... The WB emphasized avoiding work in areas near active shelling. Personnel should not be exposed to danger and workers should not be compelled to work in areas where they feel unsafe.

risk_title: Worker safety incident in conflict-affected area
risk_summary: A daily laborer was seriously injured (loss of kidney) in an accident at Line A, Al Marj on June 21, 2024, highlighting occupational hazards in the conflict-affected project area.
evidence_quote: On June 21, 2024, a daily laborer, was injured in an accident at Line A, Al Marj resulting in the loss of his kidney.

risk_title: Project closure deadline at risk due to security situation
risk_summary: The December 31, 2024 project closing date is at risk of not being met due to security-related work suspensions affecting multiple contract components, potentially resulting in loss of World Bank loan investments.
evidence_quote: the current security situation which is affecting the project sites, and will avoid the loss of investments funded by the loan... the works cannot be achieved before the closing date due to the suspension of works in the area.

risk_title: Unexploded ordnances hazard requiring clearance before work resumption
risk_summary: If project activities are halted due to shelling around work sites, unexploded ordnances (UXO) must be cleared before work can resume, creating additional security and operational risks.
evidence_quote: if project activities are halted due to shelling around works, the CDR shall ensure the area is clear of any Unexploded Ordnances (UXO) before resuming work.

risk_title: Government capacity constraints due to security situation
risk_summary: The mission noted that the security situation might affect the capacity of CDR/PMU to proceed with requested actions, indicating governance fragility in implementing project activities.
evidence_quote: The mission noted that the security situation might affect the capacity of the CDR/PMU to proceed with the requested actions.
